summary: Reworked the opening paragraph so Chapter 5 does not reuse Chapter 6's rain-and-studio-atmosphere opening scaffold, while preserving the same narrative facts, tone, and causal setup. The ending already cleanly feeds Chapter 6's next-day aftermath, so no exit rewrite was needed.
